figure.title: Credit Loops in UALink End-to-End Connection
figure.purpose: Illustrates the separated UPLI credit loops and UALink TL credit loops across an end-to-end switch connection.

technical_summary: UPLI credit loops operate locally between an upper-layer UPLI Originator and the lower TL-side UPLI Completer.
UALink TL credit loops span across the physical serial link between the local UALink TL and remote UALink TL.
In a switched connection, UALink TL credit loops are hop-by-hop (ACC to Switch, Switch to ACC).

critical_facts: Credit loops are segmented. TL credits manage link-level flow control, while UPLI credits manage protocol-level flow control.
